text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: oshogbo

Log:
  Fix building of devel/radare2.

  Change the names of fields used with the kinfo_file structure.
  FreeBSD use different kinfo_file structure then Linux.

  PR:		221347
  Approved by:	matthew@
  MFC after:	1 month
